_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values, or run Setup-Win32Forge.ps1 to generate it automatically.
_authMethod_options: MicrosoftGraphCLI  (no app registration needed)  |  CustomApp  (your own Entra ID app registration)
_clientID_note: MicrosoftGraphCLI: leave as the value below (Microsoft Graph Command Line Tools public client). CustomApp: replace with your app registration's Application (client) ID.
_verboseLogging_note: Set VerboseLogging to true to write structured log entries to LogPath. LogPath is required when VerboseLogging is enabled.
